version: Blackwood CFS v2.0 Stable Baseline before Directions fidelity checks
features_confirmed: CAFS 24 P4 data and tab order fixed
Hamburger menu with separate Appliances, Search, Directions, Theme Palette, and Training sections
Directions Book integrated into combined app
Directions Book UBD Maps header pill
Street-modal UBD split-panel map list and map viewer
UBD maps stored as replaceable JPG files
Directions Word source documents included for future content/fidelity work
Dark-only inventory theme with selectable Rescue Blue, Safe Green, CFS Yellow, Brick Red palettes
directions_source_documents: BLACKWOOD CORO EDEN HILLS ETC STREETS 122016.docx
notes: This package is intended as the stable baseline before Directions Book fidelity checks.
Directions Word files are included publicly because the project owner confirmed they do not contain sensitive information.
Do not regenerate inventory unless the Excel workbook changes.
Do not modernise Directions wording during fidelity checks unless explicitly requested.
